name: force-graph
when_to_use: 需要用最浅的 nodes/links 契约快速得到可缩放、可拖拽的中等规模 canvas 力导向图时用它,而非手写物理模拟——原生在力学迭代、命中测试和视口交互上失败;非做严格层级、正交连线或万级节点 WebGL 图。
why_valuable: AI 默认能写静态节点与连线,但做不到持续收敛的力导向模拟、canvas 命中测试和拖拽缩放协同;单包单调用把该 0% 区压成浅契约。

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-writing a physics simulation when you need the shallowest nodes/links contract to quickly create a zoomable, draggable, medium-scale canvas force graph, because native implementations fail at force iterations, hit testing, and viewport interaction; not for strict hierarchies, orthogonal edges, or WebGL graphs with tens of thousands of nodes.
en.why_valuable: AI can normally draw static nodes and links but cannot deliver a continuously converging force simulation, canvas hit testing, and coordinated drag/zoom behavior; one package and one call reduce this 0% area to a shallow contract.

data_in.note: This is the native graphData shape: the edge array is named links, and endpoint fields are source/target.

nodes.name?: string -- no hover text by default
nodes.val?: number -- node area is based on 1 by default
nodes.color?: string -- uses the library's node color by default

links.name?: string -- no hover text by default

spec.note: The canvas must receive an explicit pixel height; default 400px, with width taken from container.clientWidth. Do not use vh or percentage heights.

data_in.note: 这是 graphData 的原生形状:边数组名是 links,端点字段是 source/target。

nodes.val?: number —— 默认按 1 计算节点面积
nodes.color?: string —— 默认使用库的节点颜色

links.source: string | number —— 必须引用 nodes.id
links.target: string | number —— 必须引用 nodes.id

spec.note: canvas 必须显式收到像素 height;默认 400px,宽度取容器 clientWidth,禁用 vh/百分比高。

boot.widget: unsupported:force-graph@1 的发布 ESM 在模块求值时固定向 document.head 注入内置 CSS,无法满足 widget CSS 必须落 shadow 的零足迹铁律;需先做无 head 注入的 fork 才能上架该载体。

example._why: 网络图库对 links/edges 与 source/target/from/to 分歧大,minimal 固定本库最浅原生契约。

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;节点焦点若要进入对话,由消费 AI 接原生回调并按载体实现。

carriers.widget: unsupported:发布 ESM 固定向 document.head 注入内置 CSS,违反 shadow 零足迹要求
carriers.codex: supported:iframe 内 head 注样式可接受;ESM CDN + canvas,无 worker/wasm 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: force-graph@1.51.4 +esm contains the style-inject helper (document.head||getElementsByTagName('head')[0] + createElement('style') + styleSheet) that runs at module-eval to push .force-graph-container/.graph-tooltip CSS into document.head — confirmed. That head CSS both violates zero-footprint and never reaches shadow content, so the widget carrier is correctly unsupported. Tooltip stays in the container (no document.body); d3 zoom/drag add only transient listeners.
